web.title: Mercedes-Benz Places in Brickell Miami | New Luxury Condos
web.description: Mercedes-Benz Places Miami offers high-rise studio to 3-bedroom luxury condominium residences for sale in Brickell, with views, amenities, concierge & more.
web.markdown:
# Mercedes-Benz Place Miami, Residences

![](https://miami.mercedesbenzplaces.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/Hero-East-Mercedes-Benz-Places-Miami-JDS-Development-Group-by-The-Boundary-scaled.jpg)

![](https://miami.mercedesbenzplaces.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/Upshot-Mercedes-Benz-Places-Miami-JDS-Development-Group-by-The-Boundary-scaled.jpg)

## Timeless design, inspired by Miami

Mercedes-Benz’ first residential project in North America weaves mobility solutions with unparalleled standards of innovative living to create a visionary community. Centrally located in Brickell, Miami, Mercedes-Benz Places is being developed by JDS Development Group. The Mercedes-Benz design team has collaborated with award-winning SHoP Architects (working with ODP), interiors by Woods Bagot, and landscaping by Field Operations. With luxurious condominium residences, office and wellness spaces, a world-class hotel, and newly-built open park by Field Operations, the project establishes a one-of-a-kind, future-oriented experience. Welcome to the distinctive urban oasis that combines sophistication, convenience, and sustainable living in one extraordinary location.

[Inquire](https://miami.mercedesbenzplaces.com/contact-miami-condos/)

## Luxury rooted in design, quality, and sustainability

Mercedes-Benz is one of the first automotive brands to plan, create and operate places with a globally recognizable philosophy rooted in iconic design, technology, quality and sustainability.

By looking beyond the car and putting the human factor in the center of thought, Mercedes-Benz and JDS Development Group aim to design holistic living ecosystems that adapt to the needs of their residents and guests.

Vision Film

![](https://miami.mercedesbenzplaces.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/04/INT02_Kitchen-L-Shaped_Marble_Floor_B10-scaled.jpg)

## Residences.   Every detail considered.

Crisp blacks and whites create highlights and contours complemented by warm woods and significant graphic elements, reflecting Mercedes-refined detailing, precision and extraordinary quality.

[Explore the Residences](https://miami.mercedesbenzplaces.com/condos-for-sale-in-brickell-miami/)

![](https://miami.mercedesbenzplaces.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/04/EXT07_Pool-Aerial_v08-with-people-scaled.jpg)

## Amenities

130,000 total square feet of amenity and hospitality space, from the park to the pools to the rooftop.

[Discover Our Amenities](https://miami.mercedesbenzplaces.com/miami-condos-with-amenities/)

![](https://miami.mercedesbenzplaces.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/04/EXT09_Waterliles_WithPeople_B8-scaled.jpg)

## Southside Park

Reimagined by the renowned landscape architect Field Operations, Southside Park is the largest greenspace in Brickell–a neighborhood gathering place and leafy oasis.

Topographic contours and winding paths through local flora fauna lead to vibrant playgrounds, padel and basketball courts, dog runs and green spaces.

Lose track of time, meet neighbors, and truly connect in the sunlight and cool shade.

[Explore Southside Park](https://miami.mercedesbenzplaces.com/brickell-miami-condominiums-with-park/)

- ![](https://miami.mercedesbenzplaces.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/Lobby-Exterior-Mercedes-Benz-Places-Miami-JDS-Development-Group-by-The-Boundary.png)Lobby Entry

PORTE COCHERE

Lobby Entry

LOBBY INTERIOR

Brickell

![](https://miami.mercedesbenzplaces.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/11/Rectangle-12228.png)

## Neighborhood

Experience the cultural kaleidoscope that is Miami. Brickell is a neighborhood like no other — saturated in color and home to a soaring skyline, clear turquoise bay waters and vibrant waterways, lush streetscapes, and true walkability to world-class eateries.

[Explore the Neighborhood](https://miami.mercedesbenzplaces.com/brickell-miami-condos-for-sale/)

Lifestyle

![](https://miami.mercedesbenzplaces.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/09/TILE_02.jpg)

## Wellness

An unmatched selection of wellness amenities at Mercedes-Benz Places in Miami engage the senses and speak to every interest.

[Explore Wellness](https://miami.mercedesbenzplaces.com/miami-condos-with-amenities/)

Collaboration

![](https://miami.mercedesbenzplaces.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/04/Upshot-Mercedes-Benz-Places-Miami-JDS-Development-Group-by-The-Boundary.jpg)

## Team

A collaboration with a world-class team of visionaries rethinking the highest quality standards of living: Mercedes-Benz, JDS Development Group, SHoP Architects, Woods Bagot, Field Operations, and ODP.

[The Team](https://miami.mercedesbenzplaces.com/mercedes-benz-miami-condo-team/)

WhatsApp us

### Development Description

Timeless design, inspired by Miami.

Mercedes-Benz’ first residential project in North America weaves mobility solutions with unparalleled standards of innovative living to create a visionary community. Centrally located in Brickell, Miami, Mercedes-Benz Places is being developed by JDS Development Group. The Mercedes-Benz design team has worked in collaboration with award-winning SHoP Architects in collaboration with ODP, interiors by Woods Bagot, and landscaping by Field Operations. With luxurious condominium residences, office and wellness spaces, a world-class hotel, and newly-built open park by Field Operations, the project establishes a one-of-a-kind, future-oriented experience. Welcome to the distinctive urban oasis that combines sophistication, convenience, and sustainable living in one extraordinary location.

Beauty elevates the innovative, exclusive, and sustainable features of the residences at Mercedes-Benz Places in Miami into highly desirable emotional experiences. From studios to three-bedrooms, each residence is an immersion in modernity and luxury, meticulously conceived and created by the interiors experts at Woods Bagot, working in collaboration with Mercedes-Benz.
